title: Hello World ✋
problem: Simple hello world page to demonstrate React and Framer Motion animations
approach: Used Framer Motion for smooth entrance animations and text effects
challenges: Learning Framer Motion API and timing animations correctly
optimizations: Minimal code, optimized animation performance with useMemo
improvements: Add more interactive elements and particle effects

title: Ping Pong 🏓
problem: Create an interactive ping pong game that runs in the browser
approach: Used HTML5 Canvas for rendering and React for state management
challenges: Collision detection between ball and paddles, ball physics
improvements: Add AI opponent, multiple difficulty levels, sound effects

title: Doc Reader 📖
problem: Users need to quickly understand content from PDF/DOCX files without reading entire documents
approach: Integrated Gemini AI to summarize and answer questions about uploaded documents
challenges: File parsing, handling large files, API rate limits
improvements: Add multi-file support, better error handling, streaming responses

title: PDF Generator 📄
comment: Convert images, DOCX, XLSX, CSV to PDF
problem: Users need to convert various file formats (images, DOCX, XLSX, CSV) to PDF
approach: Used jsPDF for PDF creation, mammoth for DOCX, xlsx for spreadsheet conversion
challenges: Handling different file formats, maintaining formatting during conversion
optimizations: Client-side processing to reduce server load
improvements: Add batch conversion, more format support, PDF editing features

title: AI Chatbot 🤖
comment: Service chat bot with natural language processing
problem: Create an interactive chatbot that can understand and respond to user queries
approach: Used Socket.io for real-time communication and NLP for intent recognition
challenges: Natural language understanding, maintaining conversation context
optimizations: Caching frequent responses, debouncing API calls
improvements: Add more NLP capabilities, voice input, custom training

title: Doodle Predictor ✏️
problem: Create an AI that can recognize hand-drawn doodles in real-time
approach: Trained a CNN model using TensorFlow and converted to TensorFlow.js for browser execution
challenges: Model size optimization, real-time inference performance
optimizations: Quantized model weights, efficient canvas rendering
improvements: Add more categories, improve accuracy, custom drawing tools

title: Code Playground 💻
comment: Live code editor with HTML/CSS/JS/PHP support
problem: Provide a browser-based code editor that can execute HTML, CSS, JS, and PHP code
approach: Used Monaco Editor for the code editor and server-side execution via API routes
challenges: Secure code execution, handling PHP backend execution
improvements: Add more languages, live preview, code sharing features

title: TaskFlow ✅
problem: Need a visual task management tool with drag-and-drop Kanban boards
approach: Built a React-based Kanban board with drag-and-drop functionality
challenges: State management for drag operations, data persistence
improvements: Add subtasks, due dates, team collaboration features

title: Mood Journal 🌈
problem: Track daily moods and get AI-powered insights about emotional patterns
approach: Combined mood logging with Gemini AI for pattern analysis and insights
challenges: Storing mood history, generating meaningful insights
optimizations: Efficient data storage, cached AI responses
improvements: Add visualizations, more detailed analytics, reminders

title: Stock Tracker 📈
problem: Track real-time stock prices and display financial data
approach: Built with React Native for cross-platform mobile support
challenges: Real-time data fetching, handling market hours
optimizations: WebSocket for live updates, efficient list rendering
improvements: Add portfolio tracking, alerts, more chart types
